caption: The video features two men sitting side by side, reacting to scenes from a historical or period drama. The background includes a television screen displaying the title "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" and a collection of DVDs neatly arranged on a shelf. In the first scene, they are watching a large group of soldiers on horseback, possibly preparing for battle, with flags waving in the background. The second scene shows a man dressed in traditional attire, seated and appearing to be in a position of authority, possibly giving orders or making an important decision. Both men seem engaged and focused on the content, suggesting they are providing commentary or reactions to the unfolding events in the video.
